description_for_human: Places outbound calls for overdue car rentals.
description_for_model: Use TriggerOverdueCall to place an outbound phone call for an overdue rental. Pass the rentalId (e.g. RNT-1001). Returns objective (recover/extend/charge/escalate), rationale, overageOwedUSD, whether the call was placed, and the callConnectionId.

functions.name: TriggerOverdueCall
functions.description: Place an outbound overage call for a rental. Decides the objective per policy, places the call via ACS, runs the AI conversation via Azure Voice Live, and returns the outcome.
